What We Do

Electrical services, done properly

Fully qualified work for homes and businesses right across the Cotswolds.

Fuse Board Upgrades

Modern consumer units with RCBO protection and surge devices, fully tested and certified.

LED and Feature Lighting

Recessed profiles, strip lighting and statement designs that transform a room.

Outdoor and Garden Lighting

Up and down wall lights, soffit downlights and garden schemes, weatherproof and neat.

EICR and Safety Testing

Electrical Installation Condition Reports for landlords, homeowners and businesses.

Rewires and New Circuits

Full or partial rewires, new circuits and additions, planned around your home.

Sockets, Switches and Faults

Extra sockets, USB points, smart switches and fast, tidy fault finding.

Why Choose Us

Reliable from quote to clean up

Local to the Cotswolds

Based nearby and quick to reach you, with a proper understanding of the area.
